summary: Pack 2 - Customer 360 + Statement of Account testing completed successfully. All core features working: Customer 360 drawer with 8 tabs, Full Profile page, Statement of Account with running balance, KPI stat card filtering, CustomerLinkCell on admin pages, and customer-facing statement.

minor.issue: Endpoint accessible without authentication (returns 200 instead of 401)
Endpoint accessible without authentication (returns 200 instead of 401)

action_items: Consider adding authentication requirement to /api/admin/customers-360/stats and /api/admin/customers-360/list endpoints (minor security improvement)
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pack 2 Customer 360 features fully tested and working. All 8 tabs (Overview, Requests, Orders, Quotes, Invoices, Payments, Statement, Notes) work in both drawer and full profile page. Statement of Account shows opening/closing balance with running balance calculation. KPI stat cards filter customers correctly. CustomerLinkCell works on Orders, Payments Queue, Invoices pages. Customer-facing statement at /account/statement works with real invoice data.

customers_page.stats_cards: ✓ Total (228), Active (19), At Risk (0), Inactive (209), Unpaid Invoices (9), Active Orders (2)
customers_page.stat_card_filtering: ✓ Clicking stat cards filters table correctly
customers_page.customer_link_cell: ✓ Customer names are blue clickable links

customer_360_drawer.tabs: ✓ All 8 tabs present: Overview, Requests, Orders, Quotes, Invoices, Payments, Statement, Notes
customer_360_drawer.kpi_cards: ✓ Revenue, Outstanding, Paid, Avg Order, Punctuality
customer_360_drawer.profile_section: ✓ Company, Type, Email, Phone, Joined, Points
customer_360_drawer.sales_ownership: ✓ Sales Rep, Phone, Email, Last Activity

customer_profile_page.overview_tab: ✓ Shows profile details and sales ownership
customer_profile_page.statement_tab: ✓ Date range picker, summary totals, ledger table with opening/closing balance

statement_of_account.date_range_filter: ✓ From/To date pickers with Apply button
statement_of_account.summary_cards: ✓ Opening Balance, Total Debits, Total Credits, Closing Balance
statement_of_account.ledger_table: ✓ Date, Type, Reference, Description, Debit, Credit, Balance columns
statement_of_account.running_balance: ✓ Shows opening balance row, transaction entries, closing balance row

customer_facing_statement.date_range_filter: ✓ From/To date pickers with Apply button
customer_facing_statement.summary_cards: ✓ Opening Balance, Total Invoiced, Total Paid, Balance Due
customer_facing_statement.ledger_table: ✓ Shows actual invoice entries with running balance

customer_link_cell_integration.requests_inbox: ✓ Page loads (no requests in system to test links)

backend_apis.GET /api/admin/customers-360/stats: ✓ Returns correct structure with all required fields
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/customers-360/list: ✓ Returns customer array with search and status filters
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/customers-360/{id}: ✓ Returns enriched detail with profile_kpis and summary
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/customers-360/{id}/statem: ✓ Returns statement with entries and balances
